🌈
Jewellery

Rainbow Jewellery

Colourful hypoallergenic stainless steel jewellery

📍 Cashel Market📍 Keel Market

About Rainbow Jewellery

Rainbow Jewellery brings colour and joy to Achill Island Market with a stunning range of hypoallergenic stainless steel jewellery. Every piece is designed to be skin-friendly, tarnish-resistant and long-lasting — without compromising on style.

The rainbow bead earrings are a real standout — vibrant, eye-catching and lightweight enough for all-day wear. The stall also features bracelets, necklaces and earrings in every colour of the rainbow, perfect for matching with any outfit or mood.

If you have sensitive skin or allergies to certain metals, Rainbow Jewellery is a fantastic option — all pieces are made from surgical-grade stainless steel that won't irritate. Affordable, colourful and beautifully made.

What You'll Find

🌈 Rainbow Bead Earrings

Vibrant rainbow bead earrings — the signature piece. Lightweight and colourful.

💫 Stainless Steel Bracelets

Hypoallergenic bracelets in a range of colours and styles.

✨ Colourful Necklaces

Statement necklaces with rainbow beads and stainless steel chains.

🛡️ Skin-Friendly

All pieces are hypoallergenic and tarnish-resistant — safe for sensitive skin.
